cards.rules_text:
Sets:
• FST [i](Falling Stars — Space set)[/i]
• DON [i](Dreams of Nasen — Surreal dream set)[/i] [i](Reveal a Dream card from your sanctum and put it into your hand or draw a card.)[/i]
• RGA [i](Rallea: Golden Age — Scifi set)[/i]
• FWO [i](Forsaken Worlds — Zendikar alike)[/i]
• DDR [i](Drakol: Divinity Rising — Generic fantasy set)[/i]
• QES [i](Qianlin: Eternally Sealed — East asia setting)[/i]

FST mechanics:
• Realize
• Skyward [i](You may cast this spell from your sanctum as though it had flash by exiling an instant or sorcery spell you control that isn't being targeted.)[/i]
• Conjure
• Warp [i](horrors)[/i]

DON mechanics:
• Sagas
• Disturb
• Omen
• WISHBOARD MECHANIC that grabs an enchantment or draws

RGA mechanics:
• Spacecraft
• Craft with X
• Uncover [i](but artifacts)[/i] [i](You may cast this as a noncreature artifact from your graveyard for its uncover cost. Exile it if it would leave the battlefield.)[/i]
• Refined [i](When this creature enters, conjure its protocol into your sanctum.)[/i]

FWO mechanics:
• Ascend
• offspring
• [i]Landfall[/i]
• Verdant [i](This card can't start in your deck. {1}, Exile an untapped land you control as a sorcery: Put this card from your sanctum onto the battlefield.)[/i]

DDR mechanics:
• Omens
• [i]Ascension[/i] [i](ability word: When a card leaves grave)[/i]
• saga tokens [i](life-token-counter, surveil-draw-discard, bigpayoff-discard-sac, damage-damage-discard, land-pump-life, selection-token-drain)[/i]
• companion-alike for gods [i](exile two perms that share a color with them)[/i]

QES mechanics:
• Delve
• evoke
• mobilize
• FORGIVE [i]([cost], reveal this from your sanctum: Put it into your graveyard)[/i]

• Return target creature to its owner's hand.

• Exile target creature with mana value less than or equal to the number of creatures you control.
